title: hieracium cirritum subsp. biceps
intro: Hieracium cirritum subsp. biceps, also known as a type of hawkweed, is a plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Hieracium cirritum subsp. biceps include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its use as a diuretic to help treat urinary issues. Herbal preparations of Hieracium cirritum subsp. biceps can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea or by using the plant's roots to create a tincture.
